title: schizachne smithii
intro: Schizachne smithii, also known as tickle grass or false chess, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and bronchitis, and has also been used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin irritations. Schizachne smithii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
